title: Aves Sem Ninho
writer: Alejandro Casona, Raul Roulien, Eurico Silva
actors: Dea Selva, Rosina Pagã, Rosita Rocha
plot: A 16-year-old orphan, raised in an orphanage with inhuman treatment, is adopted by a teacher who hears her complaints when visiting the site. At the age of 24 and graduated in Social Sciences, the so-called Vitória do Santos decid...
